This folder is reserved for Pre-Qualification (PQ) tenant logos.

Place tenant logos at:
- `public/pq-logos/avenir_abudhabi/logo.png`
- `public/pq-logos/avenir_india/logo.png`
- `public/pq-logos/avenir_energy/logo.png`
- `public/pq-logos/bcts_dubai/logo.png`
- `public/pq-logos/bcts_abudhabi/logo.png`

These are served statically by Vite/Nginx at `/pq-logos/<tenant>/logo.png`.
